_comment: Hand-authored SauceDemo ground truth (QUAL-01 / D-07). DEPLOYABLE copy that ships inside the api image (tests/ is .dockerignore'd, so the runtime GET /coverage handler cannot read tests/fixtures). Kept byte-identical to tests/fixtures/ground_truth/saucedemo.json (enforced by tests/unit/test_coverage.py::test_ground_truth_copies_in_sync). Pages keyed by public URL; normalize_url strips scheme+host to path-only so the in-cluster host (http://saucedemo:80) the explorer sees still matches. No live deps, no keys.
